summary: Comprehensive UI/UX batch testing for iteration 97 - Desktop sidebar redesign, mobile hamburger menu, portal labels, theme toggle, Users tab delete buttons, and subscription plans verified

fixed.issue: Premium plan features contained 'Future: Will/Trust Wizard & Eternal Echo' from stale database data
fixed.fix: Updated get_subscription_settings() to sync features from DEFAULT_PLANS to database, removing stale feature text

desktop_sidebar.theme_toggle: ✅ Found - toggles between Light/Dark Mode correctly

dashboard.estate_readiness_score: ✅ Card found with Docs, Messages, Checklist labels

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 tested major UI/UX batch changes. All sidebar redesign features verified working. Backend fix applied to sync subscription plan features from code to database, removing stale 'Will/Trust Wizard & Eternal Echo' text. All tests passed.
rca_of_the_issue: The 'Will/Trust Wizard & Eternal Echo' text persisted in the API response because get_subscription_settings() only merged new fields into existing database records but didn't update the 'features' array. Fixed by adding logic to sync features from DEFAULT_PLANS to database whenever they differ.
